title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at FreeCharge Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at FreeCharge Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FreeCharge Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FreeCharge Advisory Limited:
FreeCharge Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
